query:
UPDATE profiles
            SET
                avatar_url = CASE WHEN $2 THEN $3 ELSE avatar_url END,
                display_name = CASE WHEN $4 THEN $5 ELSE display_name END,
                custom_status = CASE WHEN $6 THEN $7 ELSE custom_status END,
                bio = CASE WHEN $8 THEN $9 ELSE bio END,
                banner_url = CASE WHEN $10 THEN $11 ELSE banner_url END,
                updated_at = now()
            WHERE id = $1
            RETURNING
                id,
                username,
                display_name,
                avatar_url,
                status,
                custom_status,
                bio,
                banner_url,
                pending_avatar_url,
                avatar_moderation_status::text AS "avatar_moderation_status!",
                pending_banner_url,
                banner_moderation_status::text AS "banner_moderation_status!",
                EXISTS(
                    SELECT 1 FROM user_badges ub
                    WHERE ub.user_id = profiles.id AND ub.badge = 'founding'
                ) AS "is_founding!",
                created_at,
                updated_at
